high_protein.label: High Protein / Muscle & Gym
high_protein.guidance: Protein target raised, soldier. Dal, egg, paneer daily; pair dal with rice for complete protein.

diabetic_friendly.label: Managing Sugar
diabetic_friendly.limit_note: smaller white-rice portions; no sugary drinks
diabetic_friendly.reason: low glycemic load / high fiber — steady sugar
diabetic_friendly.guidance: Smaller rice, more millets and greens. No sugary drinks. This supports steady energy — your doctor guides treatment.

bp_friendly.label: Heart-healthy / Low oil
bp_friendly.limit_note: oil ≤25-30g/day; easy on pickle, papad, fried
bp_friendly.reason: supports heart & BP — low salt/oil pattern
bp_friendly.guidance: Less oil, less salt — steam and boil, soldier. Nuts and greens for the heart; your doctor leads.

iron_support.label: Iron / Energy support
iron_support.pairing: always add a vitamin-C item (lemon/tomato/amla) — triples iron absorption; no tea/coffee at mealtime
iron_support.guidance: Iron greens WITH lemon or tomato, soldier — and no tea at mealtime, it blocks iron. Supports your levels; follow your doctor's treatment.

bone_calcium.label: Bone / Calcium
bone_calcium.guidance: Ragi, curd, sesame, greens — strong bones, soldier. Morning sun for vitamin D.

digestion_fiber.label: Digestion / Fiber
digestion_fiber.guidance: More fibre — millets, dals, greens, and water, soldier. Gut stays strong.

weight_loss.label: Weight loss
weight_loss.guidance: Half plate greens, protein every meal, measured oil, soldier. Steady wins.

balanced.label: General wellness
balanced.reason: variety across food groups (ICMR My Plate)
balanced.guidance: Variety across the plate, soldier — greens, dal, curd, one fruit a day.

source: ICMR-NIN Dietary Guidelines for Indians 2024 + IFCT 2017; guidance framing only — not medical advice
